created_for: synthetic schema validation only; scorer is not connected to this config
default_behavior: Current default scoring remains unchanged: safety blocking constraints are active, descriptive diagnostics are score-neutral, and deterministic tie-break is unchanged.

constraint_weights.rationale: Blocks leakage-bearing candidates before ordinary ranking.
constraint_weights.no_oracle_safe_reason: Uses leakage flags produced by no-oracle audit, not future or gold information.
constraint_weights.expected_effect: Candidate is blocked when violation_count is greater than zero.
constraint_weights.risk_note: Do not weaken without a separate privacy and no-oracle review.

constraint_weights.rationale: Blocks candidates that use observed edit text.
constraint_weights.no_oracle_safe_reason: Uses a safety flag, not the observed edit text value.
constraint_weights.expected_effect: Candidate is blocked when violation_count is greater than zero.
constraint_weights.risk_note: Observed edit text can be target leakage for some prediction tasks.

constraint_weights.rationale: Blocks candidates that are not marked no_oracle_safe.
constraint_weights.expected_effect: Candidate is blocked when violation_count is greater than zero.
constraint_weights.risk_note: Unsafe candidates must not compete with safe candidates.

rationale: This synthetic config fixture represents the current default-like safety policy for schema validation only. It is not connected to scoring.
synthetic_only_notice: Synthetic design fixture only; no real participant data is used.
expected_action_usage_policy: Expected actions are not used for scoring or weight tuning.

forbidden_information_policy.raw_text_policy: Raw text patterns and local context strings are not allowed in config.
